Moonseed (Menispermum moonii) is a plant species that belongs to the Menispermaceae family. The health benefits of Moonseed include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Moonseed include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Moonseed include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
